name: Angela Bofill
abstract: Angela Tomasa Bofill (May 2, 1954 – June 13, 2024) was an American singer, songwriter and composer. A New York native, she began her professional career in the mid-1970s and is most known for singles such as "This Time I'll Be Sweeter", "Angel of the Night", and "I Try".

concerts.label: Newport Jazz Festival: Sacred Concert with Dizzy Gillespie and Choir

works.t: Somebody Bigger Than You and I

works_created.t: Under the Moon and Over the Sky

about_quotes.speaker: Branford Marsalis
about_quotes.evidence: I heard him play. This guy was amazing. ... We heard you playing with Angela Bofill
